name: Weather-Aware Booking
description: Branches on weather-API forecast to offer reschedule vs. confirm.

args.body: Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — no pressure, just a heads up: the forecast looks rough for your visit on {{bookingStartsAt}}. Want us to move you to a calmer day this week? Reply YES and we'll find a time that works.

args.subject: You're all set — see you at Bright Smile Dental
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Your visit at Bright Smile Dental is confirmed for {{bookingStartsAt}}. The weather looks clear, so travel should be easy.

A few friendly reminders:
• Arrive 5 minutes early so we can get you settled.
• Nothing to prepare — we'll walk you through everything.
• If anything changes, just reply to this email and we'll take care of it.

We're looking forward to meeting you. Take care,
The Bright Smile Dental team
